summary: All three Round 3 blockers are confirmed closed. The Biome format fix on platform-store.ts is clean (no fixes applied). The S2-TC-2.1b assertion correction to status: 'paused' is semantically correct — the synchronous resume response preserves the pre-resume status and the async hydration path handles the running transition. The TC-2.1c assertion correction to availableActions: ['review'] is correct — Story 1 control-derivation keeps interrupted processes reviewable during preparation. The full verify gate passes 220/220 tests across all tiers. Both nonblocking warnings (fixture status/environment pairing and TC-2.6 inventory gap) are accepted as risk — neither represents a semantic violation or scope breach that would warrant blocking the story.
